title: Presidential Permit for Enbridge Energy to Operate Pipeline Facilities at U.S.-Canada Border in North Dakota
summary: This presidential permit grants authorization to Enbridge Energy, Limited Partnership, a Delaware-organized limited partnership, to operate and maintain three existing pipeline facilities located at Pembina County, North Dakota, at the international boundary between the United States and Canada. The permit is issued under the authority vested in the President of the United States and is subject to specified conditions.

title: Presidential Permit for Enbridge Pipelines (Southern Lights) L.L.C. to Operate Pipeline Facilities at United States-Canada Border
summary: This Presidential permit grants authorization to Enbridge Pipelines (Southern Lights) L.L.C., a Delaware limited liability company, to operate and maintain existing pipeline infrastructure located at the international boundary between the United States and Canada in Pembina County, North Dakota. The permit is issued subject to specified conditions and is based on the authority vested in the President under applicable law.

title: Presidential Permit for Enbridge Energy Limited Partnership Pipeline Operations at U.S.-Canada Border in North Dakota
summary: Presidential permit issued to Enbridge Energy, Limited Partnership, a Delaware limited partnership, authorizing the operation and maintenance of existing pipeline facilities located at Pembina County, North Dakota, at the international boundary between the United States and Canada. The permit grants authority subject to specified conditions and is issued under the powers vested in the President of the United States.

title: Presidential Permit for Enbridge Energy Pipeline Operations at United States-Canada Border in North Dakota
summary: This presidential permit authorizes Enbridge Energy, Limited Partnership, a Delaware limited partnership, to operate and maintain existing pipeline facilities located at Pembina County, North Dakota, at the international boundary between the United States and Canada. The permit is granted subject to specified conditions established by the President under the authority vested in the office.

title: Presidential Permit for Enbridge Energy Limited Partnership Pipeline Operations at U.S.-Canada Border
summary: A presidential permit issued to Enbridge Energy, Limited Partnership, a Delaware limited partnership, authorizing the company to operate and maintain existing pipeline facilities located in Pembina County, North Dakota, at the international boundary between the United States and Canada. The permit is granted subject to specified conditions and terms set forth in the authorization document.

title: Presidential Permit for Enbridge Energy Pipeline Operations at U.S.-Canada Border in Michigan
summary: Presidential permit issued to Enbridge Energy, Limited Partnership, a Delaware limited partnership, authorizing the operation and maintenance of existing pipeline facilities located at the international boundary between the United States and Canada in St. Clair County, Michigan. The permit grants permission to continue operations of the specified pipeline infrastructure at the designated border crossing location, subject to conditions established in the permit document.

title: Presidential Permit for Enbridge Energy Company to Operate Pipeline Facilities at U.S.-Canada Border in Michigan
summary: This Presidential Permit authorizes Enbridge Energy Company, Inc., a Delaware-incorporated corporation, to operate and maintain existing pipeline facilities located at the international boundary between the United States and Canada in St. Clair County, Michigan. The permit is granted subject to specified conditions and is issued under the authority vested in the President of the United States.

title: Presidential Permit for Bakken Pipeline Company LP to Operate Pipeline Facilities at United States-Canada Border
summary: This presidential permit authorizes Bakken Pipeline Company LP, a Delaware limited partnership, to operate and maintain existing pipeline facilities located in Burke County, North Dakota at the international boundary between the United States and Canada. The permit is granted subject to specified conditions and is issued under the authority vested in the President of the United States.

title: Presidential Permit for Bakken Pipeline Company LP International Pipeline Crossing at North Dakota-Canada Border
summary: This presidential permit grants authorization to Bakken Pipeline Company LP, a Delaware limited partnership, to construct, connect, operate, and maintain pipeline facilities at Burke County, North Dakota, at the international boundary between the United States and Canada. The permit is issued subject to specified conditions and is granted pursuant to the President's constitutional and statutory authority.
